evidence_hint: inject.ts:147,159 pass Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(meta)) (typed NormalizedMeta) into reconcileFields, whose signature is Record<string,unknown> (reconcile_fields.ts:81-83,137-139). existingMeta comes from parseExistingMeta (inject.ts:20-42), which heuristically re-types YAML (ints only via /^\d+$/ at inject.ts:36, else string/list).
residual_if_not_resolved: Type the reconcile edge on a shared metadata record type and normalize parseExistingMeta output to the exact field types buildMeta emits (numbers, booleans, arrays).
